prose:
**Furan frontier-orbital analysis** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, PySCF; density fitting on by default), **gas phase** (no solvent model), charge 0, multiplicity 1 (RKS closed-shell). Geometry: user-supplied `.xyz` at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz (9 atoms: O, 4×C, 4×H), used as-is — this is a single point at the provided geometry, not re-optimized. SCF converged in 9 cycles.

**Headline result — HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation/optical gap).

Supporting frontier-orbital energies:
- HOMO (orbital index 17, occ 2.0) = −6.3597638 eV
- LUMO (orbital index 18, occ 0.0) = −0.1024036 eV
- HOMO−1 = −7.8707441 eV; HOMO−2 = −10.332024 eV
- LUMO+1 = 1.4483308 eV; LUMO+2 = 1.702378 eV

Koopmans-derived descriptors (from these orbital energies): vertical IP = 6.3597638 eV, vertical EA = 0.1024036 eV, electronegativity = 3.2310837 eV, chemical hardness = 3.1286801 eV, chemical softness = 0.3196236 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 1.6684195 eV.

Total electronic energy (bare nuclei + electrons, gas phase): −230.11429 Hartree (= −6261.7289 eV = −144398.9 kcal/mol). Note this energy zero is method-specific (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) and is only comparable to other same-method, same-basis energies.

**Method used:** DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (chemkit tier `standard`), gas phase, via PySCF (RKS). GFN2-xTB/PM7 note not applicable — this is a Gaussian-basis DFT run.

**Warnings:** the tool reported no warnings (empty warnings — clean run). **Integrity:** engine status "ok", trustworthy = true (all checks passed: energy finite, SCF converged, schema header and headline present).

**Reproducibility** — command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpjkfxzw28/live.json`. No experimental/literature comparison is offered; ask if you want one and I will verify a source first.
